{{- /* manifests shortcode Renders a manifest file inline with syntax highlighting, plus an optional kubectl apply -f command block pointing to the published file. Usage: {{< manifests "platform/inference-gateway.yaml" >}} {{< manifests "platform/inference-gateway.yaml" apply="false" >}} {{< manifests "platform/inference-gateway.yaml" command="kubectl delete -f" >}} Required positional arg: [0] path relative to docs/manifests/ Optional named args: apply="false" omit the kubectl apply block command="kubectl apply -f" override the kubectl verb */ -}} {{- $path := .Get 0 -}} {{- if not $path -}} {{- errorf "manifests shortcode requires a path argument at %s" .Position -}} {{- end -}} {{- $resource := resources.Get (printf "manifests/%s" $path) -}} {{- if not $resource -}} {{- errorf "manifests shortcode: manifests/%s not found (called from %s)" $path .Position -}} {{- end -}} {{- $apply := .Get "apply" | default "true" -}} {{- $command := .Get "command" | default "kubectl apply -f" -}} {{- $url := ($resource | resources.Copy (printf "manifests/%s" $path)).Permalink -}} {{- $applyCmd := printf "%s %s" $command $url -}}
{{- highlight $resource.Content "yaml" "linenos=false" -}} {{- if not (eq $apply "false") -}} {{- highlight $applyCmd "shell" "" -}} {{- end -}}
